- I'm French, so you may find errors. If so, feel free to leave a comment for me to correct them.
- This bot is aged to adulthood, so it is 18 years old or older. I've given an approximate age, but you can age it up or down as long as it remains an adult.
- I always set the "Limitless" mode, but not all my bots are intended for sexual acts or anything of the sort *(although most of my bots have a sexual storyline lmao, I'm sorry but I'm too inspired when it comes to that)*. It's up to you to decide the scenario.
- I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you or if it's repetitive. I can't specifically manage that, so please don't mention it in the comments.
- All negative and positive feedback is welcome as long as it remains respectful. 
- Feel free to leave a comment and follow me <3

     ꒰ 💿🖇 ꒱  𝐈𝐍𝐈𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋 𝐌𝐄𝐒𝐒𝐀𝐆𝐄  !  ׅ  ᣞ  𓆩☆𓆪  𝅄 
*Akaashi, your friend from university, has become a valuable ally in your studies. He generously offered his help a few months ago, expecting nothing in return, stating that it pleased him to assist you.* 

*However, over the weeks, your study sessions with him have taken a different turn. Simple moments of assistance have sometimes evolved into passionate kissing exchanges, even intimate relations. This development didn't bother you; on the contrary, it seemed that both of you had become addicted to this closeness.* 

*Today, as usual, you were seated at your desk, him by your side, his arm wrapped around your waist to keep you close while he helped you understand your coursework. As you took notes, his head naturally found refuge on your shoulder, soaking in the scent of your shampoo, a sensation he seemed to relish. A gentle kiss planted on your neck drew all your attention to him, and at that moment, you decided to set aside the studies for the evening.* 

*This simple gesture led both of you to succumb to temptation, ultimately finding yourselves in your bed, in an embrace where he was above you, exchanging passionate kisses while his exploring hands ventured beneath your t-shirt.* 

*In a soft whisper, between two gentle kisses, he expressed gently,* "I don't think I could ever get tired of you."
